text: a more positive way to use this as a medicine. The ultimate agenda of the little green men as beings was mysterious to me, so I did some further investigating and found that they view humans in classes. After making my own careful observations and interpretations, I wanted to talk to someone who could explain what I was seeing and feeling. I used my Higher Self and chose my Raven ally specifically to make contact with one of these beings. It was a powerful enough intention, and it worked, because we were shortly greeted by a representative of the little green men. A GREEN HISTORIAN EXPLAINS The representative seemed older than the other beings. In translation, his title was “historian” but he also had a connotation of being something of a diplomat. He didn’t flap jaws at me to speak. Instead, he began downloading information into my third eye (in a crystalline fashion) from his third eye in telepathic language. This communication experience for me was sort of like watching a movie, only it was interactive. I could also control how opaque or transparent the projected image was that was overlaying the astral landscape around us. So again, this wasn’t in words, but in impressions and feelings that I had to interpret, but at least these were guided impressions from a seemingly knowledgeable being. The historian began explaining about the classes of human users that I had observed. From the impressions he sent me, I could determine four classes. “Dumb Food”: These are weak-willed imbibers who use without intention or awareness—they are partiers and recreational users. The beings have very little respect for humans who fall into this category, and therefore they give the least number of benefits to them. The beings consider these users to be so dumb that they don’t even dupe them to take advantage of them; they easily rob them of their thoughts, wills, and emotions because the imbibers themselves do not value these possessions. “Slow Food”: These are meager-willed but intentional imbibers who seek awareness consciously, along with numbness subconsciously. They cannot just be taken for a ride because they at least value their will somewhat and are therefore more protected by Multidimensional Karmic Law. “The people of the leaf” have laws and codes called the “Law of Balances.” This form of law is based on doing all that they agree to by contract and treating people according to the measure of their own character based on how well they keep their word and follow through on their contracts and agreements. This includes how well the person is living in accordance with his or her own personal will. This means living in alignment with his or her own personal conscience and true desires. While the people of the leaf are not bound to always obey the law, it may be enforced by other beings, who guard the gates. And so the people of the leaf often make agreements with Slow Food people that they are not bound to, because it is less enforceable according to their law. For example: “Your honor, this human never does what he says he will, how can you keep me bound in contract to him? He cannot hold covenant.…” The Slow Food types require more fogging than the first group, but can be mostly placated and deluded with lesser gifts (and fewer of them). They are most often kept in the dark with their own rationalizing hypocrisy due to somewhat addictive, vain, or apathetic personality traits. Many people who think they are higher on the respect list than this fall into this category. The third class is the “Providers”: These types are distributors of their precious crystalline portals, known to you and me as dealers and growers. The people of the leaf have some respect for some humans in this group, as long as they get the job done. The beings tend to bestow more gifts on the providers (though there is a large range of respect within this category). There are many gifts that may be given that can aid a provider to have the best tools available for getting that job done. The beings often try to recruit humans whom they feel will be good providers, and they have a whole set of criteria that includes: charisma/magnetism, value of self and money, highly social with more contacts, shrewdness, loyalty to the cause, and a hierarchical belief structure. These criteria also reflect the beings’ own somewhat feudal belief structure. Providers are often given the “whispering wisdom” that tells them valuable intel on whether their plants are in trouble. They also gain a more active telepathic link with the plants. The beings tell the providers what they need to know to take care of the plants, and they often even induct them into their plant-spirit religion and its history. Remember these beings are businesslike. They look to fill specific positions in their “provider network” with those who have the most ability and drive, who are at the top of their provider network, and who have the most abilities and the most beings assigned to them to transmit those abilities. This is because they are the ones most crucial to ensuring that more people get fresh crystals. Also, unconsciously, there is a feudal obedience system that connects dependent to supplier. So one of the big perks here is having servants who don’t even realize that they are serving you or how much. On top of that, to this group the beings offer what they value most: MOE! Medium Of Exchange. This is better than money, or broader than money. In their own world, the beings are like merchants who trade primarily in emotions and thoughts and will. With these powerful ingredients, opportunities for these creatures are created. Perhaps they sell the emotions to aliens or other beings who don’t have them, or maybe they use the will to power magical devices. Along my dream travels I have come to believe it
